Liver:WorkFlower.NAME: Karma Flower
DESCRIPTIONS: Next rebirth will not reduce karma (even if your karma is 1).

Liver:MilkTea.NAME: MilkTea
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain 1 fullness when killing non-minion enemies (1 additional fullness for every 30 max HP of the target). NL All effects that increase max HP now increase fullness instead.

Liver:Chuang.NAME: Fire Blood
DESCRIPTIONS: Take damage equal to trauma when attacking. Lose 1 trauma at end of turn if no attack was made.
